personal.name: Sandeep Mohan
personal.tagline: A tech professional with strong family values, seeking a meaningful and balanced life partnership
personal.about: I am a calm, grounded, and practical individual with a modern outlook on life. I believe in maintaining a strong balance between career growth and family values. Coming from a close-knit, nuclear family with liberal values, I value mutual respect, trust, and open communication in relationships.

professional.title: Frontend Developer
professional.story: I am driven by a strong growth mindset. Transitioning into the tech industry, I have continuously honed my technical skills to build beautiful and efficient web applications. I believe continuous learning is key to success.

family.sister: Married, working as a Software Engineer in Finland
family.type: Middle-class, nuclear family with liberal values

expectations.description: I am looking for a well-educated partner, preferably a graduate who is working or willing to work in the future. I value kindness, understanding, and a positive family outlook. I believe mutual trust, care, and open communication form the foundation of a happy marriage. I have a liberal mindset, do not have caste preferences, and do not give importance to horoscope. I am seeking someone with a modern outlook and a positive approach to life.
